summary: Full frontend testing of Clínica Dental Santa Ana landing page. All critical features working correctly. Desktop (1280px) and mobile (375px) viewports tested.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent: constants.js centralizes all URLs, all CTAs correctly use NEXO_WA, clinic contact info uses CLINIC_WA_LINK/CLINIC_PHONE as display-only.
All data-testid attributes present on required elements.
No testimonial section present (correctly omitted per <100 reviews threshold).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified passing. Key test results: Hero WA btn → NEXO_WA ✓, all 3 pricing cards found ✓, all pricing CTAs → NEXO_WA ✓, contact section shows clinic phone 2582-0578 and clinic WA 8917-5510 (display-only, links to CLINIC_WA_LINK) ✓, sticky button visible on mobile 375px ✓, maps iframe present ✓, hours table present with Lun-Sáb ✓, footer has 2026 copyright + Nexo Sites + FB/IG links ✓, 8 service cards ✓, 5 gallery elements ✓, no testimonials ✓, all content in Spanish ✓.
tests_passed: Sticky header with clinic name and nav links (Servicios, Nosotros, Ubicación, Precios)
H1 'Clínica Dental Santa Ana' visible with 20 años subheadline and trust bullets
Hero CTA 'Escríbenos por WhatsApp' links to Nexo WA (wa.me/50689939071)
Hero secondary CTA 'Ver precios' links to #pricing
All pricing CTAs link to Nexo WA
Contact phone 2582-0578 visible, clinic WA 8917-5510 visible as display info
Hours table shows full week including Sábado
Footer: copyright 2026, Nexo Sites branding, Facebook and Instagram links
Sticky floating WhatsApp button visible on mobile (375px), links to Nexo WA
